description:
You are a production coordinator at a stop-motion animation studio. Principal photography for a commercial is complete. Assemble the 120 frames at /home/ga/Videos/stopmotion_frames/ (frame_001.png to frame_120.png), the soundtrack at /home/ga/Music/commercial_soundtrack.wav, and the production brief at /home/ga/Documents/production_brief.txt into the following deliverables in /home/ga/Videos/stopmotion_output/: 

- 'commercial_master.mp4': 12 fps, H.264, 1280x720, with soundtrack muxed in.
- 'commercial_cinematic.mp4': 24 fps, H.264, 1280x720, no audio.
- 'commercial_web.mp4': 12 fps, H.264, 640x360, with soundtrack.
- 'commercial_preview.mp4': every 10th frame starting at 001, 2 fps, no audio, 640x360.
- 'proof_sheet.png': a single image (minimum 1200x800) containing a grid of 12 key frames.
- 'assembly_manifest.json': a JSON file detailing project_name, total_frames, source_resolution, and a deliverables array containing the filename, duration_seconds, resolution, and has_audio status for each output file.
